hero.name: Viswanath Hemanth Chadalawada
hero.tagline: Building scalable AI systems, fine-tuning LLMs, and shipping production-grade GenAI products

about.lead: Technical Lead with ~4 years experience in AI + Full Stack, leading 15+ engineers end-to-end—from ML foundations to GenAI specialization.
storyBullets: From developer → system builder → team leader
achievements: Speaker at tech events (iQconnect, iQED talks)
Represented iQUA.ai product at national-level events

highlights: Led a team of 15+ developers with Agile/Scrum planning and execution.
Fine-tuned Llama 3.1, Mistral, BERT, and T5 on 30,000+ interview datasets.
Built an AI interview system (iQUA.ai) with multi-round adaptive questioning.
Designed NLP tasks: question generation, answer scoring, and feedback generation.
Served APIs with FastAPI; integrated third-party AI tools into product workflows.
Deployed fine-tuned LLMs for inference using AWS SageMaker and GCP.
Utilized AWS services including Lambda, Amplify, API Gateway, Step Functions, EventBridge, IAM, SES, EC2, S3, Secrets Manager, and RDS.
Managed relational data (MySQL) and vector infrastructure (Weaviate) for retrieval.
leadership: Owned BugSprint (AI bug tracking) as Product Owner and Technical Lead.
Participated in hiring (300+ interviews across multiple colleges).
Tech evangelism through events, demos, and stakeholder presentations.

highlights: Built FastAPI APIs and managed product database in MySQL.
Web-scraped 200k+ question-answer pairs for model training.
Implemented a React + Redux frontend and integrated API workflows.
Built a custom semantic answer evaluator using similarity scoring (semantic textual similarity).
Mentored ML teams and delivered hands-on training using Pandas, Matplotlib, and scikit-learn.
Gave a 45-minute presentation to 500+ faculty and HoDs on Deep Learning with live demos.
Co-authored videos for the Python for Beginners course on coursedunia.com.
Built 3D virtual environments and high-fidelity graphics for client-facing demos using Unity + C#.
Delivered virtual product demonstrations for industrial use-cases.

items: LLMs: Llama, Mistral, GPT, BERT, T5, Gemma
AWS: Lambda, S3, EC2, SageMaker, API Gateway, Step Functions, EventBridge, IAM, SES, RDS, Amplify

projects.name: AI Interview Platform (iQUA.ai)
projects.summary: A multi-round AI interviewer that orchestrates LLM workflows for adaptive questioning and answer scoring.
keyPoints: Answer scoring and automated feedback generation

projects.name: BugSprint (AI Bug Tracking System)
projects.summary: End-to-end AI-assisted workflow for classifying bugs and accelerating developer routing.

projects.name: Semantic Answer Evaluator
projects.summary: A scoring engine for responses using NLP similarity techniques.
keyPoints: Used NLP similarity and semantic matching approaches
Answer scoring pipeline for consistent evaluation

gamerSection.headline: Casual Gamer when not building AI systems
